start.title: Marks in the Snow
start.text: A line of strange tracks crosses the snow ahead. They look almost human, but too long and uneven.

follow.title: Vanished
follow.text: The tracks abruptly stop in the middle of an empty clearing. Nothing else surrounds them.

leave.title: Best Not To Know
leave.text: You leave the tracks behind, though the feeling of being followed lingers.
